params_frozen.design_provenance: Fresh single-class test of Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012 (JFE) opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude on Russell 2000 PIT. Distinct from archived cluster scorer (Layer 2d, CLOSED 2026-04-24) which used multiple-insiders-within-30d aggregation and FAILed (Carhart αt=2.14 IS -> 0.68 OOS overfit). Mechanism: per-insider 5y rolling history classifies routine (regular calendar-month pattern) vs opportunistic (irregular purposive timing); only opportunistic insiders retained in signal aggregation. Hypothesis is that opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude over 6m rolling window, residualized cross-sectionally vs equity controls, generates Carhart 4F αt >= 2.86 across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023. Choice motivated by (a) Perplexity reasoning rejecting compound v9D+v11 ensemble (HARKing) and v11 variant (multiplicity not escaped), recommending fresh class C; (b) Form-4 ranked above analyst-revisions due to lower decay risk + orthogonal mechanism; (c) Cohen-Malloy specifically chosen over Lakonishok-Lee net-buy because routine/opportunistic split pre-filters noise.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-05) rated path C (fresh class) as substantially more defensible than path A (compound ensemble: HARKing-adjacent, expected mechanism rho 0.65 caps ceiling at 2.55-2.65) or path B (variant on burnt 2008-2018 window). Within fresh classes, Form-4 > analyst revisions (lower decay; orthogonal mechanism). Second perplexity invocation locked: R2000 primary universe (Cohen-Malloy effect concentrated in small-caps per Table 2), accept 126d bootstrap block (matches signal window), pre-register 70pp dispersion gate for R2000 with literature citation. Gemini (gemini-3-pro-preview thinkdeep 2026-05-05) raised three load-bearing concerns, all addressed by amendments: Z1 block-bootstrap mismatch fixed via block_size=126d; Z2 stealth-multiplicity acknowledged in postmortem prose only (no n bump per project convention); Z3 size-stratification fixed via R2000 primary + R3000 secondary diagnostic. No FATAL flaws identified. Decision: PROCEED to backfill + pre-reg lock.

scorer_frozen.specification: Per-asof OLS residual of (net_oppor_usd_t / equity_mcap_t) against (reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally. net_oppor_usd_t = sum over opportunistic insiders (per Cohen-Malloy classifier) of (buy_usd - sell_usd) on (P, S) coded transactions by officers/directors over rolling 6m window [t-6m, t]. Score = +residual (NET BUY direction = positive score, no sign-flip). Long top-decile equal-weighted by score.
scorer_frozen.classifier_specification: FAITHFUL REPLICATION of Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012 JFE p. 1786 Section III.A. Classification performed at START of each calendar year Y based on 3 preceding years history. Step 1: pull all Form-4 records filed by person_cik in window [Y-3, Y). Step 2 (eligibility): require >=1 trade in EACH of the 3 preceding calendar years; if any year has zero trades, UNCLASSIFIED (excluded from signal). Step 3 (routine check): if eligible AND there exists any calendar month M in 1..12 such that the insider made >=1 trade in month M in each of the 3 preceding years, classify as ROUTINE. Step 4: if eligible but not routine, classify as OPPORTUNISTIC. Classification locked at start of year Y, reused for all year-Y trades. Re-evaluated annually using rolling [Y-3, Y) window. Routine + UNCLASSIFIED records dropped from signal aggregation.
scorer_frozen.modification_during_audit: PROHIBITED — any drift in scorer or classifier spec invalidates the pre-registration.

params_frozen.data_provider: SEC EDGAR Form-4 XML via daily index walk (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/full-index/{YYYY}/QTR{N}/form.idx) + per-CIK XML fetch via existing alphalens.data.alt_data.sec_edgar_client. Backfilled to local hive-partitioned parquet store at ~/.alphalens/form4_parquet/ for 2006-01-01 -> 2026-04-30 (~20.4yr, ~10-12M filings).

universe_primary.name: R2000_PIT

delisting_exclusion.rationale: F4 fire-sale exclusion per pit_audit_2026_04_30_findings.md; ParquetInsiderScorer line 99-104 precedent. Insider sales in months before bankruptcy/delisting are panic unloading, not informed activity; 180d covers typical pre-bankruptcy disposition window.

universe_primary.rationale: Cohen-Malloy 2012 Table 2 documents opportunistic-insider effect concentrated in smallest size quintile (t-stat ~3.5) vs largest (t-stat ~1.0 ns). R3000 equally-weighted dilutes signal in arbitraged large-cap zone. R2000 primary maximizes mechanism-aligned signal density.

universe_secondary_diagnostic.name: R3000_PIT
universe_secondary_diagnostic.rationale: Reported in audit JSON for diagnostic comparison. Four informational quadrants: R2000 PASS && R3000 PASS = upgrade; R2000 PASS && R3000 FAIL = literature-confirmed (effect localized small-cap); R2000 FAIL && R3000 PASS = mechanism refuted; both FAIL = strong negative.
universe_secondary_diagnostic.bonferroni_treatment: NO separate Bonferroni unit. Diagnostic only. Not recorded in ledger as separate test.

phase_audit.dispersion_metric_primary_R2000: max(excess_net_ann) - min(excess_net_ann) across 5 phases on R2000
phase_audit.dispersion_pp_rationale_R2000: Asness-Frazzini-Israel-Moskowitz 2018 (JFE): R2000 monthly cross-sectional return dispersion ~1.4-1.7x R1000; project-default 50pp gate calibrated for large-cap, mechanical scaling 50 * 1.4 = 70pp.

bounds_adjusted_ci.method: Romano-Wolf step-down via stationary block bootstrap (Politis-Romano)
bounds_adjusted_ci.block_size_rationale: Matches 6-month signal rolling window per Gemini Z1 amendment. 4-week project-default block would dangerously under-estimate serial correlation (consecutive obs share ~85% of underlying signal data) and inflate t-stats.

carhart_regression_hac_lock.rationale: 6-month rolling signal window induces ~126-day autocorrelation in portfolio composition, which propagates to residual autocorrelation in the daily return regression. Default Newey-West lag rule int(4*(n/100)^(2/9)) yields ~14 lags for n=1500 daily obs — too short to capture the 126-day signal memory. Lock hac_maxlags=126 explicitly per `run_regression` docstring guidance for overlapping-signal regimes. Without this override, t-stats would be inflated by under-specified HAC kernel.

frozen_scorer_integrity.rule: SHA256 hashes of alphalens/screeners/insider_activity/{cohen_malloy_classifier,opportunistic_form4}.py at audit run time must match those recorded at pre-reg lock time.
frozen_scorer_integrity.rationale: Guards against silent scorer drift between lock and audit.

no_data_peeking_clause.rule: Pre-reg locked PRIOR to any 2018+ Phase A or audit run. ANY ad-hoc 2018+ run on this scorer before this lock invalidates pre-reg.

backfill_completeness_check.rule: After SEC EDGAR backfill completes, verify (a) >=80% of asof-quarters in TRAIN 2009-2017 have >=200 distinct R2000 tickers with at least one Form-4 filing, (b) routine fraction in 2010 +/- 10pp of routine fraction in 2020 (stability check on classifier).
backfill_completeness_check.rationale: If pre-2009 backfill data quality drops materially, classifier output becomes noisy and TRAIN evaluation invalid. Trigger: restrict IS to 2014-2018 (sacrifice some power).

periods.history_lookback_rationale: 3-year window per Cohen-Malloy 2012 p. 1786 (corrected from initial 5y draft after perplexity verification of paper definition). Required for classifying insider trades in 2009 (uses 2006/2007/2008 history).
periods.rationale: OOS 2018-2023 is 6yr, never seen by any insider screener (old cluster screener tested 2024-2026 only). Final lock 2024-2026 acknowledged as having burnt-window association with old cluster scorer but uses different feature spec (Cohen-Malloy opportunistic vs cluster aggregation); postmortem must prose-acknowledge but verdict gates unchanged.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart 4-factor alpha t-stat on long-only top-decile R2000 portfolio returns minus IWM benchmark, pooled across 5 phases on OOS 2018-2023

bonferroni_accounting.rationale: First test in fresh class insider_form4_opportunistic_2026_05_05. 27th counted test in program-level Bonferroni ledger (1+1+...+1 = 27 with this test). Naive |t| >= 2.86 critical computed via alphalens.backtest.multiple_testing.bonferroni_critical_tstat. Stealth-multiplicity from class-choice-conditioned-on-prior-failures acknowledged in postmortem prose only — no numerical n bump per Gemini Z2 + project policy (else infinite regress).

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rule: Median opportunistic-insider transaction count per R2000 ticker per quarter on TRAIN 2009-2017 must be >= 2. If < 2, ABANDON with log 'DENSITY-FAIL'.
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rationale: Small-cap universe with sparse insider activity provides insufficient signal density for cross-sectional regression.

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rule: >= 30% of asof-quarters on TRAIN 2009-2017 must have >= 50 R2000 tickers with score_t != NaN. If < 30%, ABANDON with log 'BREADTH-FAIL'.
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rationale: Established gate per event_drift v3/v4 BREADTH-FAIL precedent. Cross-sectional regression with < 50 rows underpowered.

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rule: Spearman rho(score_t, forward_21d_excess_return) on TRAIN 2009-2017 must be > -0.05. If <= -0.05, ABANDON (sign-flip indicator).
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rationale: Avoid wasted multi-phase compute on a scorer that has the wrong sign on training data.

all_gates_must_pass_R2000_primary.rule: Pooled Carhart 4F alpha_t across 5 phases on R2000 OOS 2018-2023 >= 2.86
Every phase alpha_t on R2000 >= 1.5 (no phase below positive-alpha floor)
Mean excess_net_ann across 5 phases on R2000 >= 0
max(excess_net_ann) - min(excess_net_ann) across 5 phases on R2000 <= 70 percentage points

diagnostic_gates_R3000_secondary.rule: Pooled Carhart 4F alpha_t across 5 phases on R3000 OOS 2018-2023 >= 2.86 (informational)
max(excess_net_ann) - min(excess_net_ann) across 5 phases on R3000 <= 50 percentage points (informational)

verdict_classification.all_R2000_primary_gates_PASS: PASS — first phase-robust real signal in project after 11 paradigm failures + 2 INCONCLUSIVE retrospectives. Capital deploy gate STILL OFF-TABLE per project policy. Unlocks Layer 4 overlay tests (vol-target, drawdown control) on real base. Logs program n=27 -> 28.
verdict_classification.R2000_mean_alpha_t_in_2.50_2.86_AND_all_: PASS_MARGINAL — signal validated at adjusted threshold; capital deploy off-table; meta-analytic combination with prior INCONCLUSIVEs (v9D, v11) recommended in postmortem.
verdict_classification.R2000_dispersion_above_70pp_with_mean_al: INCONCLUSIVE — mean signal real but cross-phase instability prevents PASS; localized real signal but not deploy-grade. Class stays open for variant tests under fresh design.
verdict_classification.R2000_mean_alpha_t_below_2.50: FAIL — Cohen-Malloy mechanism does not survive fresh OOS post-2012 publication. Strong evidence of feature-bottleneck extending to informed-trader-flow class. Triggers pivot to fundamentally different feature space (analyst revisions, alt-data, macro).

kill_pre_full_run: Phase A0 density check FAIL (< 2 transactions/ticker/quarter median) -> ABANDON, no Bonferroni burn
Phase A1 breadth check FAIL (< 30% asof-quarters with >= 50 scored tickers) -> ABANDON, no Bonferroni burn
Phase A2 direction check FAIL (rho <= -0.05 on TRAIN) -> ABANDON, no Bonferroni burn
Phase 0 hash check fails on cohen_malloy_classifier.py or opportunistic_form4.py -> ABORT (scorer drifted)
Backfill completeness check FAIL on TRAIN coverage -> RESTRICT IS to 2014-2018 (mitigated abort)
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy remains OFF-TABLE regardless of verdict per project policy. PASS triggers Layer 4 overlay test eligibility on this base. Other verdicts maintain status quo (paper-trade observation only).

lock_hash_protocol.method: SHA256 of this JSON file content (excluding lock_hash field itself) computed and stored in ledger entry at registration. Any subsequent modification to params_frozen invalidates pre-reg.
